centertext_templates: breath slowing into perfect quiet stillness
deep stillness absorbing all remaining tension
the quiet here growing deeper with each exhale
body settling into empty, complete stillness
each breath slower, quieter, more still
the space between breaths growing slower and longer
breath moving through a deep and empty quiet
tts_templates: the space between each exhale grows longer, quieter, and your {body_part} settles deeper into that expanding stillness with each breath
there is a quality to this quiet that goes beyond the absence of sound — a deep stillness spreading through your {body_part} with each slow exhale
with each breath, the emptiness grows a little more complete, your {body_part} sinking deeper into the kind of stillness that needs nothing at all
the natural rhythm of your breathing carries you further into this quiet, and each exhale releases a little more of what was keeping things busy
somewhere in the slow rhythm of each breath, your {body_part} finds the kind of stillness that simply is — deep, empty, completely at ease
